name: Festival Sweets & Spice Gift Box

name: Madras Turmeric Powder
description: Elevate your dishes with the rich flavor of our Madras Turmeric Powder, known for its vibrant orange color and bold, slightly sweet taste. Our turmeric is sourced from the finest farms in India, ensuring its high purity and potency. Perfect for curries, stews, and other Indian recipes.

name: Organic Haldi Powder
description: Elevate your cooking with our high-quality, organic haldi powder sourced from the finest turmeric roots in India. Our haldi powder is rich in antioxidants, anti-inflammatory properties, and has been traditionally used to enhance immunity and boost digestion. With its high purity and absence of additives, this organic haldi powder is perfect for making a variety of Indian dishes, from curries to pickles.

name: Nagpur Turmeric Powder
description: Enrich your culinary experience with the warmth of Nagpur Turmeric Powder, sourced from the renowned markets of Nagpur. This high-quality turmeric powder is 100% pure and free from additives and adulterants. Add a hint of authentic Indian flavor to your recipes with this premium turmeric powder.

name: Ayurvedic Haldi Powder Blend
description: Experience the authentic taste of India with our Ayurvedic Haldi Powder Blend, carefully crafted from high-quality turmeric roots sourced from the lush fields of Tamil Nadu. This expert blend not only adds a warm, golden hue to your curries but also offers numerous health benefits, thanks to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Our Ayurvedic Haldi Powder Blend is free from additives and preservatives, ensuring its purity and authenticity.

name: Turmeric Powder 6X
description: Experience the authentic flavor and aroma of traditional Indian turmeric with our premium Turmeric Powder 6X. Our 6X refers to the 6-fold purification process, ensuring utmost purity and minimal impurities. Sourced from the finest organic turmeric roots in the spice belt of India, our powder is free from artificial additives and chemical pesticides.

name: Organic Haldi Capsules
description: Introducing our Organic Haldi Capsules, made from 100% pure and organic turmeric, sourced from the lush fields of India. Packed with antioxidants and curcumin, these capsules promote digestive health and immunity. Trust our USDA-certified organic capsules for a natural and holistic well-being.

name: Best-Sale Kashmiri Haldi
description: Unlock the ancient secrets of Ayurveda with our Best-Sale Kashmiri Haldi, sourced from the esteemed regions of Kashmir. This premium combination brings the finest quality Haldi, known for its exceptional purity and therapeutic properties, straight to your doorstep. Our Kashmiri Haldi is revered for its potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it an essential addition to your wellness routine.

name: New-Arrival Turmeric and Mustard Oil Blend
name_hindi: हरा इलायची और सरसों तेल मिश्रण
description: Elevate your cooking experience with our handcrafted Turmeric and Mustard Oil Blend, rich in antioxidants and essential fatty acids. Sourced from local farms, our blend ensures maximum purity and potency. Authentic and Ayurveda-inspired, our blend is perfect for enhancing the flavor and aroma of your favorite Indian dishes.

name: Organic Haldi
description: Unlock the natural benefits of our Organic Haldi, sourced from the finest Indian turmeric farms. Our high-quality turmeric is 100% organic and free from harmful chemicals, ensuring a purer and more effective haldi experience. Experience the authentic taste and aroma of India with every use.

name: Haldiram Turmeric Powder
description: Indulge in the authentic taste of India with Haldiram's Turmeric Powder, made from the finest quality Haldi sourced from the foothills of the Himalayas. This premium spice blend undergoes rigorous purity testing to ensure its authenticity. Enhance the flavor of your curries, soups and other Indian dishes with this high-quality powder.

name: Dabur Haldi Dard Nivarak
description: Experience the therapeutic benefits of authentic Indian turmeric with Dabur Haldi Dard Nivarak, sourced from the finest turmeric fields of India. This spice powder is known for its purity and high curcumin content, which helps to alleviate joint pain and inflammation. With its rich aroma and flavor, it adds a zing to your favorite recipes.

name: MTR Turmeric Powder
description: Add a rich and earthy flavor to your dishes with MTR Turmeric Powder, sourced from the finest turmeric plants in India. MTR's high-quality turmeric powder is made from 100% pure and carefully selected ingredients, ensuring a vibrant yellow color and a warm aroma. This authentic spice is carefully crafted to enhance the taste and nutritional value of your meals.

name: Zandu Himalayan Turmeric Powder
description: Experience the potency of Indian medicine with Zandu Himalayan Turmeric Powder. Derived from the renowned region of the Himalayas, this powder is 100% pure, non-GMO and free of additives. It's an excellent anti-inflammatory agent, making it an ideal addition to your diet.

name: MDH Red Chili Powder

description: Add the authentic taste of India to your cooking with MDH Red Chili Powder. Made from high-quality ingredients, this powder is ideal for a variety of dishes.

name: Zaiqa Red Chili Powder
description: Add a spicy zing to your cooking with Zaiqa Red Chili Powder. Made from high-quality, all-natural ingredients, this powder is perfect for health-conscious consumers.
